results.rendered_html:
āsita p. p. [ās-kta] Seated, at rest; āsitaḥ saḥ; āsitaṃ tena  Sk. 
— taṃ
1 Sitting down.
2 A seat; idameṣāmāsitaṃ  Sk. 
3 Abode, a place where one has lived; a city.
